EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of additional information required for midterm policy amendment.
EmailTemplate.name: Midterm - Submitted
EmailTemplate.subject: Information Received
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
I have passed your responses to our Underwriting Team for review.
Please allow 48 working hours for our reply. We will, of course, endeavour to get back to you sooner.
Please note, if the request should need to be referred to the insurer for approval, this can take slightly longer for a response.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
